hooks.command: F=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$F" in */CLAUDE.md) VER=$(grep -oE 'v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' "$F" | head -1); if [ -n "$VER" ]; then SETTINGS="${F%/CLAUDE.md}/app/src/main/java/com/averycorp/averytask/ui/screens/settings/SettingsScreen.kt"; [ -f "$SETTINGS" ] && sed -i -E "s|text = \"AveryTask v[0-9.]+\"|text = \"AveryTask ${VER}\"|" "$SETTINGS"; fi ;; esac
